title: Marketplace Manager - Shyaway Digital Technologies - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Shyaway Digital Technologies - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shyaway Digital Technologies family as a Marketplace Manager in Aurangabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shyaway Digital Technologies:
Shyaway Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shyaway Digital Technologies!
